events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"medium","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":85,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.85,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Missing drip loop on service entrance conductors at service drop termination","No downward loop formed before service head/point of attachment, allowing water to track into service raceway/cable"],"actions":["Form required drip loop on service-entrance conductors per NEC Art. 230 before closeout/inspection","Verify service head/raceway orientation and weatherhead to ensure water sheds away from building"],"rationale":"NEC Art. 230 requires service-drop conductors to be arranged with a drip loop so water will not enter the service raceway/equipment; absence is a non-compliant rough-in defect.","references":["NEC Art. 230"]}
